name: academorix/people
purpose: Central-plane people directory — global PersonIdentity records carrying the Academorix ID, guardian/minor links, and consent-gated tenant link requests.
capabilities: PersonIdentity global record carrying the Academorix ID
Deduplication across tenants for the same real human
Foundation for cross-tenant reporting and safeguarding
when_to_use: Linking a tenant-local Athlete/Staff row to a central PersonIdentity that survives cross-tenant, or wiring guardian relationships.
when_not_to_use: For per-Application User rows and tenant membership, use the sibling academorix/user package.
